title: got unexpected result when inserting duplicate records
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, PRIMARY KEY(id));
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id=id;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE age > (SELECT AVG(age) FROM t1);
key_bug_features: Inserting duplicate data does not throw expected exception
